definition: Participant ID from the participant_id column or sub-<id> filename token.
Session label from the session column or ses-<id> filename token.
Source CSV filename for this run.
Full path to the source CSV.
MD5 hash of the file (duplicate-run detection).
TASK_VERSION stamped in the data rows.
RNG seed for the run.
Usable bandit trials (1..3 choice and reward/loss outcome) used for fitting.
True if rho was a free parameter; False if fixed at 1 (default).
M2 learning rate applied when the prediction error was >= 0 (gain).
M2 learning rate applied when the prediction error was < 0 (loss).
M2 asymmetry; positive means faster updating from gains. Interpret only where M2 beats M1.
M2 softmax inverse temperature; higher is more value-consistent/exploitative choice.
Reward sensitivity used in the update; fixed at 1 unless ESTIMATE_RHO is True (then weakly identified).
M2 negative log-likelihood of observed choices; lower is better.
M2 Akaike information criterion (k=3, or 4 if rho estimated).
M2 Bayesian information criterion.
M2 McFadden pseudo-R^2 vs a uniform 3-way guess: 1 - NLL/(n*ln3). 0 = chance, 1 = perfect.
Proportion of trials whose observed choice is the model's argmax-probability arm (M2).
Mean M2 predicted probability of the observed choice.
Whether the M2 optimizer reported convergence.
M2 optimizer message.
M1 single learning rate (alpha_pos == alpha_neg).
M1 softmax inverse temperature.
M1 negative log-likelihood.
M1 AIC (k=2).
M1 BIC (k=2).
M3 positive learning rate (model with stickiness).
M3 negative learning rate.
M3 softmax inverse temperature.
M3 stickiness/perseveration on the previously chosen arm; positive = repeat regardless of value.
M3 negative log-likelihood.
M3 AIC (k=4).
M3 BIC (k=4).
M2 AIC minus M1 AIC. Negative => dual-alpha M2 preferred by AIC.
M2 BIC minus M1 BIC. Negative => M2 preferred by BIC.
M3 AIC minus M2 AIC. Negative => adding stickiness preferred by AIC.
M3 BIC minus M2 BIC. Negative => stickiness preferred by BIC.
Model with the lowest AIC among M1/M2/M3.
Model with the lowest BIC among M1/M2/M3.
Free parameters sitting at an optimization bound, prefixed by model; railed estimates are weakly identified.
Count of boundary flags across M1/M2/M3.
States whether rho was fixed at 1 (recommended) or estimated despite confounding with beta.
Mean choice RT (s) across modeled trials.
Median choice RT (s) across modeled trials.
Trialwise: 1-indexed bandit trial number.
Trialwise: reversals completed before this trial (phase = swap_count + 1).
Trialwise: chosen arm (screen position 1..3).
Trialwise: 1 if rewarded, 0 if loss.
Trialwise: 1 if the chosen arm was the current highest-probability arm.
Trialwise: pre-update value of arm 1 (left).
Trialwise: pre-update value of arm 2 (middle).
Trialwise: pre-update value of arm 3 (right).
Trialwise: pre-update value of the chosen arm.
Trialwise: model probability of choosing arm 1.
Trialwise: model probability of choosing arm 2.
Trialwise: model probability of choosing arm 3.
Trialwise: model probability of the observed choice.
Trialwise: rho*r - Q_chosen; the feedback-locked RPE regressor for iEEG.
Trialwise: alpha_pos or alpha_neg, by the sign of the prediction error.
Trialwise: choice reaction time (s).
